I filled up with gas and bought a sandwich...Good service.

reviews.comment:
No tiene nada para comer, y le doy 2 estrellas xq tenía para pagar con la app el combustible

(Translated by Google)
There's nothing to eat, and I'm giving it 2 stars because I had the option to pay for fuel with the app.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdTkzNWdRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Qué asco el baño!!! Todo sucio!!! Entre que la gente es sucia y deja todo en un estado deplorable si encima no lo limpian la combinación es fatal!!

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom is disgusting!!! It's filthy!!! Between people being dirty and leaving everything in a deplorable state, and then not cleaning it, the combination is awful!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtcTdMUXJnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The bathroom facilities leave much to be desired.

reviews.comment:
El servicio, bueno.
El combustible me parece que medio truchon. Me empezó a tironear como si tuviera agua.

(Translated by Google)
The service was good.
The fuel seemed a bit dodgy. It started jerking like it had water in it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdy1EU2xRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar completo, variedad de productos. Fácil ingreso desde la autovía y retorno a la misma.

(Translated by Google)
A complete store with a wide variety of products. Easy access from the highway and back.
